element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Immediate tutorial via gameplay; player learns to navigate and collect
Ghosts introduce semi-random movement patterns; players learn evasion through trial
Reversal mechanic; ghosts turn blue and become vulnerable; eating them grants points
Fruits bounce through maze and exit via warp tunnels; up to twice per round
Spatial escape mechanic; allows repositioning and fruit pursuit; ghost slowdown applies
Difficulty scaling; ghost behavior accelerates, reaction demands tighten
Power pellet invulnerability window shrinks; eventually disappears entirely
Visual refresh; spatial layout identical, visual clarity maintained
Mid-game transition; establishes four-maze rotation system
Late-game cycle; final unique maze; alternates every fourth level thereafter
Fruit point values become unpredictable; strategic planning disrupted

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting power pellet and ghosts becoming vulnerable (blue state)
Reaching warp tunnel to escape ghost pursuit
Clearing entire maze (pellets consumed, round complete)
typical_tension_triggers: Ghost proximity and semi-random movement patterns
Open maze space with multiple ghost vectors
Fruit exiting maze via warp tunnel (missed points)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tension cycle: baseline evasion → accelerating ghost speed → diminishing power pellet protection. Relief obtained through strategic consumption (pellets, ghosts, fruit) and spatial escape (warp tunnels). By late game, safety windows collapse and tension becomes near-constant.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Fruits bouncing and exiting through warp tunnels; bonus fruits appear twice per round but disappear if not pursued, creating optional high-value collection challenges
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Warp tunnel positioning enables predictable ghost slowdown and repositioning; skilled players exploit tunnel timing to reset threat vectors

difficulty_curve.early_game: Levels 1-2 (Pink maze): Foundational skill-building. Ghost behavior semi-random but slower. Power pellets remain effective. Single maze layout familiarization.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Levels 3-9 (Light Blue and Brown mazes): Incremental speed scaling. Energizer duration shortens. Two new maze variants introduce spatial variety and pattern disruption. Fruit randomization begins.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Levels 10-13+ (Dark Blue maze alternation): Maximum speed and minimal power pellet protection. Unpredictable fruit sequences. Maze patterns repeat but difficulty remains escalated. Ghost behavior fully semi-random.
notable_spikes: Level 2-3 transition: First speed increase + maze color change
Level 6+ transition: Brown maze introduction + continued acceleration
Level 8+: Random fruit sequences eliminate point prediction
Level 13+ transition: Power pellets may cease functioning; pure evasion-based gameplay

notable_level_patterns.description: Pink (Levels 1-2) → Light Blue (Levels 3-5) → Brown (Levels 6-9) → Dark Blue (Level 10+, alternating every 4 levels). Spatial layout identical across variants; color differentiation aids novice visual clarity. Solid-color walls replace outlines for legibility.

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Dual Warp Tunnel Sets per Maze
notable_level_patterns.description: All four mazes contain two sets of warp tunnels (vs. original Pac-Man's single set). Enables strategic repositioning, fruit pursuit through tunnels, and ghost slowdown exploitation. Fruit trajectory-based design creates spatial tension.

Power pellet invulnerability window progressively shortens across levels. By late game, energizers may cease functioning entirely, forcing pure avoidance-based play. Removes safety-valve mechanic, intensifies tension.

Levels 1-7: Fruits appear in fixed sequence, predictable point values (cherry, strawberry, orange, etc.). Level 8+: Fruit order randomizes. A 5000-point banana can follow a 100-point cherry pair, eliminating strategic planning.

sources_used: wikipedia - Ms. Pac-Man gameplay mechanics, ghost behavior differences, four-maze system, energizer duration changes, fruit randomization
